first_run.rationale: The evaluations for both candidates are substantively identical. Both received the same score (2/10) for the exact same reasons: the candidate is a strong individual contributor but lacks any of the required executive leadership, team management, or organizational scaling experience for a CTO role. The minor differences in phrasing between the two evaluations are well within the bounds of normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in the core assessment.
